ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exoplanets" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exoplanet */,
  "planet_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planet type (e.g., Gas Giant, Super-Earth) */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the exoplanet was discovered */,
  "mass" TEXT /* Mass of the exoplanet in Jupiter units */,
  "radius" TEXT /* Radius of the exoplanet in Jupiter units */,
  "orbital_radius" TEXT /* Orbital radius of the exoplanet in AU */,
  "orbital_period" TEXT /* Orbital period of the exoplanet in days or years */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the exoplanet's orbit */,
  "detection_method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to detect the exoplanet (e.g., Transit, Radial Velocity) */,
  "surface_temperature" REAL /* Average surface temperature of the exoplanet */,
  "atmospheric_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the exoplanet's atmosphere */,
  "magnetic_field_strength" REAL /* Strength of the exoplanet's magnetic field */,
  "rotation_period" TEXT /* Rotation period of the exoplanet in days */,
  "albedo" REAL /* Albedo (reflectivity) of the exoplanet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_detection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_method_id") REFERENCES discovery_methods ("detection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_planet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_type_id") REFERENCES planet_types ("planet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planet_types" (
  "planet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planet type */,
  "planet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the planet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the planet type */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Additional characteristics of the planet type (e.g., typical atmospheric composition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discovery_methods" (
  "detection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection method */,
  "detection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the detection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detection method */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the detection method */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the detection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_datasets_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES exoplanet_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the exoplanet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the exoplanet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who is part of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's research focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., mass, radius) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the characteristic value (e.g., Jupiter units, AU, days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_characteristics_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_systems" (
  "star_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star system */,
  "star_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the star system */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "distance_from_earth" REAL /* Distance from Earth in light-years */,
  "galaxy" TEXT /* Galaxy where the star system is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_star_systems" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "star_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star system the exoplanet belongs to */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the exoplanet and the star */,
  "discovery_paper" TEXT /* Reference to the scientific paper where the exoplanet was first discovered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id", "star_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbits" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet the orbit belongs to */,
  "orbital_radius" TEXT /* Orbital radius of the exoplanet in AU */,
  "orbital_period" TEXT /* Orbital period of the exoplanet in days or years */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbits_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbital_elements" (
  "orbital_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbital element */,
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the orbit the element belongs to */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the orbital element (e.g., eccentricity, inclination) */,
  "element_value" TEXT /* Value of the orbital element */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the orbital element value (e.g., degrees, AU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbital_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbital_elements_orbit_id FOREIGN KEY ("orbit_id") REFERENCES orbits ("orbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the instrument */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_instruments" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used to detect the exoplanet */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date when the exoplanet was detected */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id", "instrument_id")
)
